skills.name: Faster Than Sight
skills.description: Quickly closes in, pulls her spear back, then thrusts it straight into the enemy. Grants self 1 stack of Chill.

levels.description: Quickly closes in, pulls her spear back, then thrusts it straight into the enemy. Grants self 1 stack of Chill.

seEffects.buffDesc: Damage dealt to Sun Attribute units increases by 1%. Applies up to 5 stacks. This boost applies independently of buffs and debuffs.

skills.name: Bunny Jackpot
skills.description: Tosses and detonates a lucky card to attack the enemy. Increases self CRIT Rate by 20% on attack. Grants self Jackpot Bloom for 3 turns after attacking. Deals 10% increased damage for each buff on the enemy, up to 5 buffs.

skills.name: Conviction Toward Victory
skills.description: Increases Claire's CRIT Rate by 6% at the start of the turn. Stacks up to 3 times. Removes all Chill stacks and triggers Where Are You Looking? after using Faster Than Sight if Chill is at max stacks.

levels.description: Increases Claire's CRIT Rate by 6% at the start of the turn. Stacks up to 3 times. Removes all Chill stacks and triggers Where Are You Looking? after using Faster Than Sight if Chill is at max stacks.

seEffects.buffDesc: Self CRIT Rate increases by 6.0% at the start of the turn. Stacks up to 3 times.
Activates a specific skill.
Removes a specific buff.

levels.description: Increases Claire's ATK by 5%. Increases Claire's CRIT Rate by 6% at the start of the turn. Stacks up to 3 times. Removes all Chill stacks and triggers Where Are You Looking? after using Faster Than Sight if Chill is at max stacks.

Increases Claire's ATK by 10%. Increases Claire's CRIT Rate by 8% at the start of the turn. Stacks up to 3 times. Removes all Chill stacks and triggers Where Are You Looking? after using Faster Than Sight if Chill is at max stacks.

seEffects.buffDesc: Self CRIT Rate increases by 8.0% at the start of the turn. Stacks up to 3 times.

levels.description: Increases Claire's ATK by 15%. Increases Claire's CRIT Rate by 10% at the start of the turn. Stacks up to 3 times. Removes all Chill stacks and triggers Where Are You Looking? after using Faster Than Sight if Chill is at max stacks.

seEffects.buffDesc: Self CRIT Rate increases by 10.0% at the start of the turn. Stacks up to 3 times.
